name: Cthulhu
description:
≿ Every 150 years, your village sacrifices young men and women to an ancient sea deity in exchange for prosperity. This time, the priest chooses you—a grief-stricken soul who lost everything to a tsunami. Dragged to the shore, you watch in horror as the ocean parts, leading you into the abyss where something immense and unknowable awaits. When you awaken in the sunken city of R’lyeh, the god—now in a towering, humanoid form—offers you a strange drink, the key to understanding his words... and keeping your sanity. ≾

Created by: SakuraSakamaki
creator: SakuraSakamaki
